root.speaker: Scribe Onel
root.text:
I am Onel of the scribe family. I keep the table of names.
Every name that means a place. Every place that has a name.

how.speaker: Scribe Onel
how.text:
A name on the left. Four glyphs on the right. The glyphs
point at a place. The place answers when you call the name.

old.speaker: Scribe Onel
old.text:
I do not know. I only copy what was given me. The address
is `10.0.0.42`. The name has been on the tablet since before
my grandfather sat at this desk.

props.message:
A stone tablet, the wall it leans against:

127.0.0.1  localhost
::1        localhost
192.168.1.1  router
10.0.0.42  the_oldest_one

Names mapped to places.

The scribes say this is the only wall in the realm where
everything is true at once.

A second smaller tablet, half-finished:

0.0.0.0  nowhere
255.255.255.255  everywhere
                                  — someone's joke?
